posts.author: tompgc (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mon.com Expert Community!
I have a subitem column listing the a number. As you can in excel I would like to express the row as a percent of the total. I want to multiply this percentage the row numberanother percentage.
I want to then roll-up the result to the parent.
